g.text: read spec, status, delete intent, and OCI lifecycle
- The formal secret profile is stronger than current code
because an active function without InvokeEndpoint still
returns success without writing a Secret.
- Confirm deletion with GetFunction until the lifecycle is
DELETED or the resource is not found.
- Delete the owned Secret after OCI delete confirmation.
unsupported or immutable drift is detected
wait for the spec or live state to change
owned Secret cleanup fails after OCI delete
retry Secret cleanup until completion is allowed
